root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.deposit_account_id , (CASE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex WHEN 'M' THEN 'ชาย' ELSE 'หญิง' END) as sex_desc , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth) as tdate_of_birth , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date) as approve_tdate , pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as age_live , pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as age_mem , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_member_retire(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)) as retire_tdate , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_member_work_info , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_share_mem WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' ) and ( sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock > 0 and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth is not null /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no

r_vjr_member_detail_count_mem_nest.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc , sum((CASE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex WHEN 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) as count_male , sum((CASE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex WHEN 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) as count_female FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_member_work_info , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type , sc_mem_m_share_mem WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' ) and ( sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock > 0 and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth is not null /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc ORDER BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code
